final.sql:
SELECT p.ID, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) AS age
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.HCT > (
    SELECT MAX(CASE 
        WHEN l2.HCT IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(l2.HCT AS REAL) 
        ELSE NULL 
    END)
    FROM Laboratory l2
    WHERE l2.HCT IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY CAST(l2.HCT AS REAL) DESC
    LIMIT 1 OFFSET (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Laboratory WHERE HCT IS NOT NULL) / 2
)
GROUP BY p.ID
HAVING C...
